input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.4.3.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.4.3.5
            TITLE: any accumulators that may vent an explosive gas must have a ventilation system or pressure

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.4.3.5: Any Accumulators that may vent an explosive gas must have a ventilation system or pressure
EV.4.3.5 Any Accumulators that may vent an explosive gas must have a ventilation system or pressure 
relief valve to release the vented gas

final_answer: Any Accumulators that may vent an explosive gas must have a ventilation system or pressure relief valve to release the vented gas
